themes.title: Real-Time Collaboration
themes.description: Core features enabling real-time editing and collaboration among users.

themes.title: User Experience Enhancements
themes.description: Improvements to the mobile editing experience and user feedback collection.

themes.title: Testing and Feedback
themes.description: A/B testing and feedback mechanisms to refine collaboration features.

milestones.name: MVP - Real-Time Co-Editing
milestones.description: Implement the core real-time co-editing feature along with necessary support mechanisms.
milestones.success_criteria: Real-time co-editing is functional with at least 90% accuracy in presence indicators.

milestones.name: V1 - Mobile Editing Enhancements
milestones.description: Enhance the mobile editing experience and collect user feedback.
milestones.success_criteria: Achieve a 75% satisfaction rate from user feedback on mobile editing.

milestones.name: V2 - A/B Testing on Collaboration Features
milestones.description: Conduct A/B testing to evaluate the effectiveness of collaboration features.
milestones.success_criteria: Complete A/B testing with at least 500 users and analyze results for actionable insights.

sequencing.reason: The mobile editing enhancements depend on the successful implementation of the real-time co-editing feature.
A/B testing requires the mobile editing enhancements and user feedback to be in place.

v1.goal: Enhance user experience and gather feedback for improvements.

v2.goal: Test and refine collaboration features based on user data.
